159.reason: [The condition uses '||' instead of '&&', causing the loop to continue incorrectly when either condition is true, leading to infinite loop or incorrect parsing of CompUnit]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing null check for tnow1 before calling getTokenType(), which will cause a NullPointerException when reaching the end of the input stream.

1089.reason: Error: preRead should only peek, not remove the token, otherwise subsequent getAToken() will miss it.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: preRead should only peek, not remove the token, otherwise subsequent getAToken() will miss it.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  This method should only peek at the next token without removing it, but it removes the token, causing loss of the token.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  This line consumes the token, but preReadAToken should only peek/lookahead without removing it from the deque.

1580.reason: Incorrectly uses TokenType.AND for a single '|' error; it should be TokenType.OR to correctly represent the logical OR operator in syntax analysis.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly uses TokenType.AND for a single '|' error; it should be TokenType.OR to correctly represent the logical OR operator in syntax analysis.

205.reason: [This line incorrectly treats successful parsing as an error. After successfully parsing MainFuncDef, the parser should return normally instead of printing an error message and returning the next token.]
